  {()=>{const[value,setValue]=useState({year:2019,month:11,day:15});const onChange=(year,month,day)=>{if(!!year&&!!month&&!!day){setValue({year,month,day});}};// provide `day` value for  min, max properties in years object to limit selection by day!
const years={min:{year:2018,month:1,day:25},max:{year:2020,month:2,day:4}};return<Fragment mdxType="Fragment">
  	<DatePicker years={years}value={value}lang={["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"]}onChange={onChange}mdxType="DatePicker"/>
  </Fragment>;}}
</Playground>
<h3{...{"id":"using-a-custom-picker"}}>{`using a custom picker`}</h3>
<p>{`You can specify a `}<strong parentName="p">{`custom picker component`}</strong>{`. If you go for this approach, don't forget to manually set the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`isOpen`}</inlineCode>{` prop to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` in order to effectively show your picker`}</p>
<Playground __position={2}__code={'() => {\n  const Arrow = ({ isOpen }) => {\n    return (\n      <div\n        className={\n          isOpen\n            ? styles.exampledDatepickerArrowOpen\n            : styles.exampledDatepickerArrow\n        }\n      />\n    )\n  }\n\n  const [value, setValue] = useState(null)\n  // Manual control of  DatePicker\'s show prop\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)\n  const onChange = (year, month, day) => {\n    if (!!year && !!month && !!day) {\n      setValue({ year, month, day })\n    }\n    setIsOpen(false)\n  }\n  const togglePicker = () => {\n    setIsOpen(!isOpen)\n  }\n\n  // specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection\n  const years = {\n    min: { year: 2018, month: 1 },\n    max: { year: 2020, month: 2 },\n  }\n  return (\n    <Fragment>\n      <DatePicker\n        years={years}\n        value={value}\n        show={isOpen}\n        onChange={onChange}\n      >\n        {/* Custom picker component*/}\n        <span\n          className={styles.exampledDatepickerValueWrapper}\n          onClick={togglePicker}\n        >\n          {value && `day ${value.day}, ${value.month} of ${value.year}`}\n          {!value && \'Customized Date Picker\'}\n          <Arrow isOpen={isOpen} />\n        </span>\n        {/**/}\n      </DatePicker>\n    </Fragment>\n  )\n}'}__scope={{props:this?this.props:props,useState,Fragment,Playground,Props,styles,DatePicker}}__codesandbox={`N4IgZglgNgpgziAXKCA7AJjAHgOgBYAuAtlEqAMYD2qBMNSIAPOhAG4AEE6AvADogAnSpQL8AfIwD0LVmJABfADQg0mXACsEyEFRp0CDSQCojvVO3YAVPBDjsAwpUwBlAIYYARpSzs8rux4wdOyuAK4ElESuBBDkrlBQAJ7sAOZ0MALRMOjsoXBoKWYWAAZUmHDu6F5YGcU47ACSYOyJlKEA5AIw7OShAhBtdniUAO7sBH4Evq4ADjPp6IotbT3uRT14MOQA1uxtU20C7OiU5EMZMIi-BAQzcIiSkikQE6EeOFREkmXwldXfTl--PgdhuCU9YogEZ5UCudoAAZ2CTGYsHaPdqxmDsWBnPyABYQvYAA2EKwvWMBgMQ71oESPz-GcQ4EQdTBSKEfgliIahKDgSKEVS6t0poZwIDYy52AARli8L5BsuypgAQTmNz2AjKDyBsKB0DDLSOTcsRhujGQeIIFzuGAdjnKxeQtxrYAxugSbggAMkO8ZEnmShmj2iapu4W65TAGjJQGVB2nYAB-DZ9rDCMZquK6DtQbrqykGQqzfMwYW4zAwDCKAph-2b5uBgbl2rCxgAR7g5uAFcLF69g-oEIQxnckbODgHV5nMeQZqxjy0ZrCwugIPpzCjBnGYTGRcc5vHyIkgA5b0YFWnneYsWxKboMXxYsD7eKxHAfzJbIVNoGZ1IyQnial_0OdlmsrgV-Alawb0VfQNWYA1nYtaJ0YZcZoGDfYTcZbfXmgZ5_GAG1WHiBklhgggADUA5gABdIa8lg-DaAjVBQgXHnHnYPV3FCXtdFRSgoD2Zp2CttTbYEdpCWGMZ-0oGZveoeyfclqmg9HBoKapqP3JjuCsgjGGoBgj3Ofx6h7D8GdulJxJxQEcrgLwJZ0Ao2nsZliBmgjABCDep9cI5jvYLeKpoPF963xfEhmnH9cZ4Ow6gBkyZ3mf2CPiYF4o6aZed8Xg9b3Xe_iAPHm39Gb4wiBiWAxcNJHFJsvemstf5tzoJvRudBB5OxsrzVO1Uthr2SEQNA5VXA-CrrCGIrk0AtGnnYSgHh1BbCmBEdgUB-TjhgrAJ61Ba6oHsk_Ow7kr6ywIb5JSVDd5XAAEz-TagADlnsfK4bUtLhSEcQq4UEn6SP8lI-RExJHKOATzZmrMkay0YMhVwqF9DbTMUXTWAhHY1j4atPhICDb-3viLYAHiGRuIQRXVaqDAaOIsCPMeaRVphPcGkPxnMbEG2AMYBweQIiyhttAws6Z9A8libzRg1U1jX3FuQfmcAhZHlWsbOAptzawEtlkdJGQ74MgAOqZDmBkXJ4sR4sJ2KtcBmIYBQM6SE9g8SXbePDuwfexRz7sAACSTM8Tgc-SgFlLIZDgV-eAMIXXWT4v8T95DFC6bzYAG8DnTJOu0ewKTIjNVzFbUi9j2inM5owbWoxya60CUgwGrtxniykAU1AgKznGByY4qQdiS5gtrJICxViaCAvQVpb-UgUZgzMF-EAIkxJnEktJGCsktAUGAvoBgRhwpGEQIgQI6UujUtpa4MAtAjiCPYNUc0-Q2IFCuGgTY_QCD4QsF5HyVx_-gMhSpxOgPR7VEpdCIFumyO7KAQJgAAGVcIEKAR7andA5WKtA5pYCssUX-gDesVkDhOCMVAtyUSRE-SMaDJ6OX9HbQQK45o2qofWBEGYkjqPBPQyiaIeRry73TgIaBlhhBwwgDMIjKtVWfu_RInVuqGPbsmtXLDOG7lEFA7Yc8x7BNwd3j5Qt1crixT1X-g-JlhTuGFQG9Dys6lW0aQIAjqrBT5G7CIro5EYisBgFKzYbaO3tX8v5Q16xhN4HozAf9xmzA1N_PU9W9iCOIBZWy1V2d9BXH4PJCwfmJWudbWRtL6wzVTglTpwL   {()=>{const Arrow=({isOpen})=>{return<div className={isOpen?styles.exampledDatepickerArrowOpen:styles.exampledDatepickerArrow}/>;};const[value,setValue]=useState(null);// Manual control of  DatePicker's show prop
const[isOpen,setIsOpen]=useState(false);const onChange=(year,month,day)=>{if(!!year&&!!month&&!!day){setValue({year,month,day});}setIsOpen(false);};const togglePicker=()=>{setIsOpen(!isOpen);};// specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection
const years={min:{year:2018,month:1},max:{year:2020,month:2}};return<Fragment mdxType="Fragment">
  	<DatePicker years={years}value={value}show={isOpen}onChange={onChange}mdxType="DatePicker">
      {/* Custom picker component*/}
      <span className={styles.exampledDatepickerValueWrapper}onClick={togglePicker}>
        {value&&`day ${value.day}, ${value.month} of ${value.year}`}
        {!value&&"Customized Date Picker"}
        <Arrow isOpen={isOpen}mdxType="Arrow"/>
      </span>
      {/**/}
    </DatePicker>
  </Fragment>;}}
</Playground>
<h3{...{"id":"month-picker"}}>{`month picker`}</h3>
<p>{`You can also display `}<strong parentName="p">{`month options`}</strong>{` instead of the default `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`days`}</inlineCode>{` view.`}</p>
<p>{`Obs: the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`onChange`}</inlineCode>{` function will not return the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`day`}</inlineCode>{` value, obviously because it is not supposed to be shown. Instead, only `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`year`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`month`}</inlineCode>{` options are passed as parameters`}</p>
<Playground __position={3}__code={'() => {\n  const [value, setValue] = useState(null)\n  const onChange = (year, month) => {\n    if (!!year && !!month) {\n      setValue({ year, month })\n    }\n  }\n  // specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection\n  const years = {\n    min: { year: 2018, month: 1 },\n    max: { year: 2020, month: 2 },\n  }\n  return (\n    <Fragment>\n   {()=>{const[value,setValue]=useState(null);const onChange=(year,month)=>{if(!!year&&!!month){setValue({year,month});}};// specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection
const years={min:{year:2018,month:1},max:{year:2020,month:2}};return<Fragment mdxType="Fragment">
      	<DatePicker years={years}value={value}// enable isMonthsMode prop
isMonthsMode={true}onChange={onChange}mdxType="DatePicker"/>
      </Fragment>;}}
</Playground>
<h3{...{"id":"month-picker-with-range-option"}}>{`month picker with range option`}</h3>
<p>{`To use the range option, just enable the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`isRange`}</inlineCode>{` prop. In this case, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`value`}</inlineCode>{` is treated as an array, where the first element is the initial range value, and the second is the last range value.`}</p>
<Playground __position={4}__code={'() => {\n  const initialValues = [\n    { year: 2019, month: 3 },\n    { year: 2020, month: 2 },\n  ]\n  const [values, setValues] = useState(initialValues)\n  const onChange = (year, month, idx) => {\n    if (!!year && !!month) {\n      const newValues = values ? [...values] : []\n      newValues[idx] = { year, month }\n      setValues(newValues)\n    }\n  }\n  // specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection\n  return (\n    <Fragment>\n      <DatePicker\n        value={values}\n        isMonthsMode={true}\n        // enable isRange prop\n        isRange={true}\n        onChange={onChange}\n      />\n    </Fragment>\n  )\n}'}__scope={{props:this?this.props:props,useState,Fragment,Playground,Props,styles,DatePicker}}__codesandbox={`N4IgZglgNgpgziAXKCA7AJjAHgOgBYAuAtlEqAMYD2qBMNSIAPOhAG4AEE6AvADogAnSpQL8AfIwD0LVmJABfADQg0mXACsEyEFRp0CDSQCojvVO3YAVPBDjsAwpUwBlAIYYARpSzs8rux4wdOyuAK4ElESuBBDkrlBQAJ7sAOZ0MALRMOjsoXBoKWYWAAZUmHDu6F5YGcU47ACSYOyJlKEA5AIw7OShAhBtdniUAO7sBH4Evq4ADjPp6IotbT3uRT14MOQA1uxtU20C7OiU5EMZMIi-BAQzcIiSkikQE6EeOFREkmXwldXfTl--PgdhuCU9YogEZ5UCudoAAZ2CTGYsHaPdqxmDsWBnPyABYQvYAA2EKwvWMBgMQ71oESPz-GcQ4EQdTBSKEfgliIahKDgSKEVS6t0poZwIDYy52AARli8L5BsuypgAQTmNz2AjKDyBsKB0DDLSOTcsRhujGQeIIFzuGAdjnKxeQtxrYAxugSbggAMkO8ZEnmShmj2iapu4W65TAGjJQGVB2nYAB-DZ9rDCMZquK6DtQbrqykGQqzfMwYW4zAwDCKAph-2b5uBgbl2rCxgAR7g5uAFcLF6zgCJieIADV4gZOx3IAbVxnaWnFMt2AAJn8tqAE5yuAvAriTLTwprfmlLp1wGeZ5mOZoLmmd5mmAF0afxynWDJ-AlhgghSagcmZaGvJYPg2gIzQF4IBJ5W4DfAXC1QezqHsPwZ26dyI0SenxYmJYuCwGasY8tGBYgZoIwAQiDl3hfYY72BDiqJZmnG_ct_HnRGDXyaGpXNdcj7KZwXOM619grkpuWE4F5PU_gSnPe19yoLDgQ3bxIHLf5tWK7gCNy7Ni2W-bgW-_5x4ePmcgA-SIg0HK1wfH7ShYRiVy0CFgQ7EoDx1C2KYInYKB-XHGDYCe6gaa6Ag-nMKNS4TZDXFQ_Rtpb2sVNoNSdlBK-BfzmBVq_uAB8fzgcA9ScyAYCVaqIGT_0fkPOgrgPCwEASKdwaQ-wDhppbWwSCHbgLRDAKBLdbb2zSKtQhyC8HoJrJuChUgb53xoA_GsPcLDyD7lIFGYMzBfhACJMSZxJLSRgrJLQFBgL6AYEYcKRhECIECOlLokjpGuDALQI48cLDVHNPkNiBQrhoE2P0Ag-ELBeR8lcfyRi-xRR0ewcxZggZmEICQX2FgGoWi0a1RKjMcAAFYACkFiNFaOsV4AQU5zTVACRKbYVE2gYHNFQKAQorhKwEBGc05pHFQHCSkD8dibJeHQMkNRhpgKaOaq1FJaTzSuLKS1c0qAhRRCgLk-qpSYYTySMk4WVSantOyuaWgWACAtLxpQRJDNKnpMGRaBJQoRk7zQDADJMAIApEIF01J6TqoSgKOaRmLT7GoFcOFVwiBd6oG2CcxArBbAvFzMU6ZlothCmiM9K4DTnT4UOTgCIGJYAAHVMhzAyGeLA3oyTdGKSwaq5EcqGlgFgCx8RVmoHNHcog9wej6AyBYnE6AJhXDaolLoRAvk2R-ZQP5MAAAycD5ygvBQg4pJi0DmlgMowlJKyX-lQDgSac8TgjFQPYPIEQiB9QEEIEYDLfzOInKs9Z7BzRtS5esCIMwriM1VYDclKJoh5GvMLPUwsNICEsMIOGEAZgyohXKvFBKmZeO8dq75_KZiCuFaKyI1LbDnjBbK5lwsfIDLnlcWKPiSVRxMsKdwhi8k8pwD-CF6Bn4wBmOpDIEqpVysFPkbsvkJzzleawGAFjNgKoIIS_y_l_HrHtZLLVMBSXxrMIm_1ybU3prfgILNoxEBKJUXK3QIFK3sH4PJCw9azFlpWWs0dtjqwhKnGYiNTaeJjK4OMTI1tIphjjYuoUYTZkTO6ek495oqIURmqidw2y91btvbul0N   {()=>{const initialValues=[{year:2019,month:3},{year:2020,month:2}];const[values,setValues]=useState(initialValues);const onChange=(year,month,idx)=>{if(!!year&&!!month){const newValues=values?[...values]:[];newValues[idx]={year,month};setValues(newValues);}};// specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection
return<Fragment mdxType="Fragment">
      	<DatePicker value={values}isMonthsMode={true}// enable isRange prop
isRange={true}onChange={onChange}mdxType="DatePicker"/>
      </Fragment>;}}
</Playground>
<h3{...{"id":"date-picker-with-range-option"}}>{`date picker with range option`}</h3>
<Playground __position={5}__code={'() => {\n  const initialValues = null\n  const [values, setValues] = useState(initialValues)\n  const onChange = (year, month, day, idx) => {\n    if (!!year && !!month && !!day) {\n      const newValues = values ? [...values] : []\n      newValues[idx] = { year, month, day }\n      setValues(newValues)\n    }\n  }\n  // specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection\n  return (\n    <Fragment>\n      <DatePicker\n        years={{\n          min: { day: 1, month: 2, year: 2020 },\n          max: { day: 1, month: 3, year: 2021 },\n        }}\n        value={values}\n        // enable isRange )\n}'}__scope={{props:this?this.props:props,useState,Fragment,Playground,Props,styles,DatePicker}}__codesandbox={`N4IgZglgNgpgziAXKCA7AJjAHgOgBYAuAtlEqAMYD2qBMNSIAPOhAG4AEE6AvADogAnSpQL8AfIwD0LVmJABfADQg0mXACsEyEFRp0CDSQCojvVO3YAVPBDjsAwpUwBlAIYYARpSzs8rux4wdOyuAK4ElESuBBDkrlBQAJ7sAOZ0MALRMOjsoXBoKWYWAAZUmHDu6F5YGcU47ACSYOyJlKEA5AIw7OShAhBtdniUAO7sBH4Evq4ADjPp6IotbT3uRT14MOQA1uxtU20C7OiU5EMZMIi-BAQzcIiSkikQE6EeOFREkmXwldXfTl--PgdhuCU9YogEZ5UCudoAAZ2CTGYsHaPdqxmDsWBnPyABYQvYAA2EKwvWMBgMQ71oESPz-GcQ4EQdTBSKEfgliIahKDgSKEVS6t0poZwIDYy52AARli8L5BsuypgAQTmNz2AjKDyBsKB0DDLSOTcsRhujGQeIIFzuGAdjnKxeQtxrYAxugSbggAMkO8ZEnmShmj2iapu4W65TAGjJQGVB2nYAB-DZ9rDCMZquK6DtQbrqykGQqzfMwYW4zAwDCKAph-2b5uBgbl2rCxgAR7g5uAFcLF6zgCJieIADV4gZOx3NQUIElxwtUHsgBtVgyfgJYYIIUmoHJgBdIa8lg-DaAjNAXggEmWbgN8axrfHqHsPwZ26dyI0ScUBHK4C8CWdAKKWLgsBmrGPLR6XOGaCMAEILdV1wjmO9grYqmg8Xtq2dcSGacZN026fs50Rk58mhuZrnXI-hmcEjkOefYK4Ge52npf9wP4AZ_XefcqCbfV9gnYmbWKK0xOa3ZlO4AjZOJaln2i-92ufceHj5nICAwGSIg0HK1wfH7ShYRiVy0BaNW7EoDx1C2KYInYKB-XHGDYCe6haa6Ag-nMKM64TZDXFQ_Rtpr2sVNoNSdlBLfTezuBVq9w-fY73ylOOCirjajXnauAAmJZs6__zP8CkoYu99u5XCgu7V-78JhXCTD_NWf9P5tS0uFO-NZ5BA1QRYaOMBVrYLgBgzBjc6CuA8LATgcARTuDSH2AcwCay2EoYrVaqIGQENQXLBWaRVocKoTANhNdNzFykDvPeNAD41mrhYdB0ZJAozBmYL8IARJiTOJJaSMFZJaAoMBfQDAjDhSMIgRAgR0pdAMUY1wYBaBHFvuwao5p8hsQKFcNAmx-gEHwhYLyPkrj-U8X2KKzj2B-LMEDMwhASDGwsA1C0jjWqJU_jgAArAAUn8fYxxQSvACCnOaao6SJTbCom0DA5oqBQCFFcZmAgIzmnNBEqAeSUgflCTZLw6Bki2JiQ45qrVqm1PNN0uJ5pUBCiiFAFp9VgKDKykkKptsBndJhh3JI5paBYAIJMvGlAKllnYP0up6yLTlKFFsmeaAYD1JgBAFIhB5k1LqdVCUBRzSf0mWE1ArhwquEQLPVA2xvmIFYLYF4uZbFHMtFsIU0RnpXFGc6fCHycARAxLAAA6pkOYGQzxYG9GSbotiWDVXIjlQ0sAsD-PiDc1A5pQVEHuD0fQGR_E4nQNA9qiUuhEERTZZFlBUUwAADIkPnDivFZDbHeLQOaWAVjX5cp5f6VAOBJp9xOCMVA9g8gRCIH1AQQgRhit_FEicNy7nsHNG1BV6wIgzC_tawGvKUTRDyNeW2epbYaQEJYYQcMIAzCNfik1rL2Wf0SUkh1SLVUzHVZq7VkRBW2HPLi41krbY-TWX3K4sVklcodiZYU7gPGtKVTgH8-L0DHxgDMdSGQ9UGpNYKfI3ZH5dHIjEVgMB_GbDNQQV-_l_JpPWCGvA9qYDcpLWYMtKaK1VprWfAQ9bRiIEsdYk1ugQJ9vYPweSFgR2-O7dc25W6QnVmyVOXxubx08R2VwcYmR6aRTDM   {()=>{const initialValues=null;const[values,setValues]=useState(initialValues);const onChange=(year,month,day,idx)=>{if(!!year&&!!month&&!!day){const newValues=values?[...values]:[];newValues[idx]={year,month,day};setValues(newValues);}};// specify min, max properties in years object to limit selection
return<Fragment mdxType="Fragment">
      	<DatePicker years={{min:{day:1,month:2,year:2020},max:{day:1,month:3,year:2021}}}value={values}// enable isRange prop
isRange={true}onChange={onChange}mdxType="DatePicker"/>
      </Fragment>;}}
</Playground>
<h3{...{"id":"years-as-array"}}>{`years as array`}</h3>
<Playground __position={6}__code={'() => {\n  const Arrow = ({ isOpen }) => {\n    return (\n      <div\n        className={\n          isOpen\n            ? styles.exampledDatepickerArrowOpen\n            : styles.exampledDatepickerArrow\n        }\n      />\n    )\n  }\n\n  const [value, setValue] = useState(null)\n  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)\n  const onChange = (year, month, day) => {\n    if (!!year && !!month && !!day) {\n      setValue({ year, month, day })\n    }\n    setIsOpen(false)\n  }\n  const togglePicker = () => {\n    setIsOpen(!isOpen)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <Fragment>\n      <DatePicker\n        years={[2015, 2017, 2019]}\n        value={value}\n        show={isOpen}\n        onChange={onChange}\n      >\n        <span\n          className={styles.exampledDatepickerValueWrapper}\n          onClick={togglePicker}\n        >\n          {value && `${value.day}/${value.month}/${value.year}`}\n          {!value && \'Pick a date\'}\n          <Arrow isOpen={isOpen} />\n        </span>\n      </DatePicker>\n    </Fragment>\n  )\n}'}__scope={{props:this?this.props:props,useState,Fragment,Playground,Props,styles,DatePicker}}__codesandbox={`N4IgZglgNgpgziAXKCA7AJjAHgOgBYAuAtlEqAMYD2qBMNSIAPOhAG4AEE6AvADogAnSpQL8AfIwD0LVmJABfADQg0mXACsEyEFRp0CDSQCojvVO3YAVPBDjsAwpUwBlAIYYARpSzs8rux4wdOyuAK4ElESuBBDkrlBQAJ7sAOZ0MALRMOjsoXBoKWYWAAZUmHDu6F5YGcU47ACSYOyJlKEA5AIw7OShAhBtdniUAO7sBH4Evq4ADjPp6IotbT3uRT14MOQA1uxtU20C7OiU5EMZMIi-BAQzcIiSkikQE6EeOFREkmXwldXfTl--PgdhuCU9YogEZ5UCudoAAZ2CTGYsHaPdqxmDsWBnPyABYQvYAA2EKwvWMBgMQ71oESPz-GcQ4EQdTBSKEfgliIahKDgSKEVS6t0poZwIDYy52AARli8L5BsuypgAQTmNz2AjKDyBsKB0DDLSOTcsRhujGQeIIFzuGAdjnKxeQtxrYAxugSbggAMkO8ZEnmShmj2iapu4W65TAGjJQGVB2nYAB-DZ9rDCMZquK6DtQbrqykGQqzfMwYW4zAwDCKAph-2b5uBgbl2rCxgAR7g5uAFcLF69g-oEIQxnckbODgHV5nMeQZqxjy0ZrCwugIPpzCjBnGYTGRcc5vHyIkgA5b0YFWnneYsWxKboMXxYsD7eKxHAfzJbIVNoGZ1IyQnial_0OdlmsrgV-Alawb0VfQNWYA1nYtaJ0YZcZoGDfYTcZbfXmgZ5_GAG1WHiBklhgggADUA5gABdIa8lg-DaAjVBQgXb3qHsn3JapoPRwaCmqaj9yY7grIIxhqAYI9zn8eoew_BnbpScScUBHK4C8CWdAKNp7GZYgZoIwAQn7xvXCOY72EHiqaDxMfB47xIZpx_XGeDsOoAZMnh-b9hJ4mduKOmmXnfF4Oc91kv4nLnmj8Z_GIgxWA1Nto5Sa7-nZZP3O6AHjO6Arp2bN5szVmSNZaMGQq4VC-htqgKto_DSAhHY1k3nAVaPsABM_k2oAFYlgYLagAdlwZggAnBHa-Bt_ZrxFsAShDJyHv2GCMVaP9AaIIsNXWuaRVocPcGkehnNoEG0YNVNYS9xbkH5nAIWR5VrGzgKbc2sBLZZBtvA1eDIADqmQ5gZH4bLauUB1KrTvpiGAcDdFsPYIIl2NDw7sDHsUAAJLYqhOA57yEkM42hf4d54A8V48OOBN7yGKHo8WwB-7ePsSddocCQjHCyO0MJvNGDa1GOTXWzDP6A1dtY8WUgRGoDyYzKQsDNYCGKbWSQ4DIE0DyX_LSR8pAozBmYL8IARJiTOJJaSMFZJaAoMBfQDAjDhSMIgRAgR0pdDGRM1wYBaBHEXhYao5p8hsQKFcNAmx-gEHwhYLyPkrj-X2X2KKmz2AnLMF7VAhASBv0NMBNZzVWqJTQTgLBABSU5qz1kXK8AIKc5pqg_IlNsKibQMDmioFAIUVx_YCAjOac0dyoDApSB-a5NkvDoGSMsx5NBnktXhSPJF5oGoWnWTAc0qAhRRCgJi-qTyYZEGyiSxFyKKXkqykkc0tAsAEEZXjSgsKyzsARWS_-T5deq4sUPnZvHiZYU7g9lYpbcrJRVtVF22Jg8wU-Ruy-QnPOR1rAYCnM2CqtV7V_L-W-esI9eBZ0XrzWB1WKjyl9sQPMxZDzdAgVHewfg8kLD4eOWh5VI7WPrABVOY5v6YCyjgCKrg4xMioBEWGYD1ZuMZGhSKuF4rSXIplQIc0VFO4ifcOJl0qJNORQkxpsTen9CnOU-qpTcmVP9n5CPeepzYMvCdSEDwgm160FOdO3jWb-OnOHZh_yOAkxEdAy-8DZGn59t1jRx0VV4BXBI8o9W5H7YjGbWYBRv4EvWySzrKmlGFmaRtV-   {()=>{const Arrow=({isOpen})=>{return<div className={isOpen?styles.exampledDatepickerArrowOpen:styles.exampledDatepickerArrow}/>;};const[value,setValue]=useState(null);const[isOpen,setIsOpen]=useState(false);const onChange=(year,month,day)=>{if(!!year&&!!month&&!!day){setValue({year,month,day});}setIsOpen(false);};const togglePicker=()=>{setIsOpen(!isOpen);};return<Fragment mdxType="Fragment">
  	<DatePicker years={[2015,2017,2019]}value={value}show={isOpen}onChange={onChange}mdxType="DatePicker">
      <span className={styles.exampledDatepickerValueWrapper}onClick={togglePicker}>
        {value&&`${value.day}/${value.month}/${value.year}`}
        {!value&&"Pick a date"}
        <Arrow isOpen={isOpen}mdxType="Arrow"/>
      </span>
    </DatePicker>
